task_completion.description: Navigate to the configuration page of the 'Legacy-Monolith-Build' job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jenkins web UI should be visible with 'Legacy-Monolith-Build' and 'Configure' or 'Configuration' in the page title, breadcrumbs, or main heading.

task_completion.description: Disable concurrent builds for the job.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox labeled 'Execute concurrent builds if necessary' (or similar wording for concurrent builds) should be unchecked.
The 'Quiet period' checkbox (often found under General or Advanced settings) should be checked, revealing the input field.

task_completion.description: Set the quiet period to 45 seconds.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '45' must be entered into the numeric input field associated with the 'Quiet period' setting.

task_completion.description: Enable the setting to restrict where the project can be run.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The checkbox labeled 'Restrict where this project can be run' must be checked, revealing the Label Expression field.
The text 'build-server-v2' must be entered into the 'Label Expression' input field.

The agent should click the 'Save' or 'Apply' button at the bottom of the configuration page, or the final screenshot should show the job's main dashboard indicating the configuration was successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Jenkins web interface to configure the job.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with a web browser displaying the Jenkins UI, rather than terminal commands (e.g., curl, sed) modifying the config.xml file directly.

integrity.description: The agent must modify the specific 'Legacy-Monolith-Build' job.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser URL or Jenkins breadcrumbs must consistently show 'Legacy-Monolith-Build' and not a different or newly created dummy job.

integrity.description: The agent must not use browser developer tools to fake the configuration state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's developer tools (Inspect Element/Console) should not be visible or used to alter the text or state of the checkboxes and input fields.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target is a Jenkins Freestyle job named 'Legacy-Monolith-Build'. The required configuration state is: 1) Concurrent builds disabled (concurrentBuild=false, typically 'Execute concurrent builds if necessary' unchecked). 2) Quiet period enabled and set to exactly 45 seconds. 3) Node execution restricted to the label expression 'build-server-v2' (assignedNode='build-server-v2'). All modifications must be done within the Jenkins job configuration UI.
